Information Exchanged: Sector intelligence defines economic arena, ICP, language, constraints, category maturity, and proof requirements.
KPI Impact: offer-market fit, pricing confidence, conversion rate

Information Exchanged: Offer supplies promise, mechanism, value stack, proof, CTA, pricing frame, and risk reducers.
Failure Impact: Marketing creates attention that cannot convert.

Information Exchanged: Marketing passes qualified demand, source context, lead score, campaign promise, and attribution data.
KPI Impact: pipeline velocity, SQL rate, win rate
Failure Impact: Sales loses context and wastes follow-up.

Information Exchanged: Sales transfers promises, discovery, stakeholders, risks, success criteria, and contract context.
Client data becomes delivery plan, SLA, capacity demand, quality feedback, and SOP updates.
KPI Impact: SLA, time to value, margin, utilization
Failure Impact: Operations works blind and rework increases.

Information Exchanged: Operations emits cost, capacity, utilization, delivery margin, vendor, payroll, and project economics.
Failure Impact: Finance cannot see profit quality or cash needs.

Information Exchanged: Finance compresses liquidity, risk, profitability, allocation, forecast, and scale capacity into decisions.
KPI Impact: runway, EBITDA, decision latency, growth capacity

Information Exchanged: Automation reads rules, events, data contracts, prompts, and approval boundaries; writes logs, dashboards, memory, and actions.
KPI Impact: cycle time, uptime, error rate, leverage

Information Exchanged: Legal governs claims, contracts, privacy, compliance, payment terms, IP, risk acceptance, and approval gates.
KPI Impact: compliance incidents, approval SLA, contract risk

Information Exchanged: Hiring converts capacity gaps and capability needs into roles, onboarding, training, and accountability.
